Gold medallists China's Wang Chuqin, China's Ma Long and China's Fan Zhendong pose with their medals on the podium of the men's table tennis team event at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024.
Photo: WANG Zhao / AFP

China芒聙聶s Ma Long became the country芒聙聶s most decorated Olympian on Friday, Aug. 9, winning his sixth gold medal of his athletic career alongside teammates Wang Chuqin and Fan Zhendong, as they beat Sweden in table tennis.

Ma said he芒聙聶s glad to get the 芒聙聹perfect ending芒聙聺 in his last Olympics.芒聙聹This is my last Olympics and the experience is perfect. I feel very proud and lucky,芒聙聺 said Ma.

China's gold medallists Xu Shixiao and China's Sun Mengya celebrate winning in the women's canoe double 500m final of the canoe sprint competition at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024. Photo: Bertrand GUAY / AFP

Xu Shixiao and Sun Mengya also won another gold for China in the women芒聙聶s canoe double 500-meter final at the Vaires-sur-Marne Nautical Stadium. Ukraine took silver, and Canada picked up the bronze.

China's Chen Yiwen competes in the women's 3m springboard diving final during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024. Photo: Oli SCARFF / AFP

Chen Yiwen also won the gold medal in the women芒聙聶s 3-meter springboard, extending China芒聙聶s winning streak in the 2024 Games diving events to seven. She was the only diver on Friday that scored over 70 points in each round. Australia芒聙聶s Maddison Keeney took silver and China芒聙聶s Chang Yani won the bronze medal.

芒聙聹My heart was beating so fast from the warm-up all the way through the last dive,芒聙聺 Chen told reporters after the event. 芒聙聹Then when I finished the last dive I suddenly calmed down, like I had just let out a long breath.

Back on land, China芒聙聶s Wu Yu claimed gold in the women芒聙聶s 50 kg boxing championship while teammate Yang Liu took home the silver medal in the women芒聙聶s 66 kg boxing final after losing to Algeria芒聙聶s Imane Khelif.

Algeria's Imane Khelif and China's Yang Liu (Blue) compete in the women's 66kg final boxing match during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024. Photo: MOHD RASFAN / AFP

Canada won the men芒聙聶s Olympic 4x100 meter relay for the second time on Friday after the United States fumbled a changeover and was disqualified.

The United States did secure a gold medal in the women芒聙聶s 4x100 meters relay, capturing their 12th title in the event.

U.S.' Sha'Carri Richardson crosses the finish line to win the women's 4x100m relay final of the athletics event at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024. Photo: Antonin THUILLIER / AFP

Melissa Jefferson, Twanisha Terry, Paris Olympic 200m champion Gabby Thomas and Sha芒聙聶Carri Richardson clocked 41.78 seconds for the U.S.

Making Olympic history, China芒聙聶s Liu Qingyi (aka 671) pop and locked her way to the bronze medal in the B-Girls breaking on Friday, Aug 9, as breakdancing made its debut at this year芒聙聶s Games. Japan芒聙聶s Ami Yuasa took home gold while Lithuania芒聙聶s Dominika Banevic took silver.

China's Liu Qingyi, known as 671 competes in the Women's Breaking dance Round robin of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024. Photo: Odd ANDERSEN / AFP

Yuasa, known as B-Girl Ami, laid down a series of halos to seal the 3-0 win which brought the crowd at La Concorde to their feet.

Japan's Ami Yuasa known as Ami competes in the Women's Breaking dance gold medal battle of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024. Photo: Odd ANDERSEN / AFP

China also took home silver in women芒聙聶s field hockey, losing to the Netherlands after a penalty shootout following a 1-1 draw in regulation. The win gave the Dutch a hockey double after Thursday芒聙聶s men芒聙聶s win. The Chinese team opened the scoring in the sixth minute when forward Chen Yi turned midfielder Dan Wen芒聙聶s pass past Veenendaal, stunning the ranks of Dutch fans packed into the stands.

China芒聙聶s Song Jiayuan won the bronze in the women芒聙聶s shot put final, while Germany芒聙聶s Yemisi Ogunleye won the gold and New Zealand芒聙聶s Maddison-Lee Wesche claimed the silver.

Brazil's #02 Eduarda Santos Lisboa and Brazil's #01 Ana Patricia Silva Ramos celebrate after winning the women's gold medal beach volleyball match between Brazil and Canada during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on August 9, 2024. Photo: Jeff PACHOUD / AFP

In the last game of the day, Brazilian pair Ana Patricia Silva and Eduarda Santos won gold in women芒聙聶s beach volleyball, taking the victory after beating Canada in three tense sets.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.

title: China brings home more gold on Day 14 of Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: China芒聙聶s Ma Long became the country芒聙聶s most decorated Olympian, winning his sixth gold medal of his athletic career alongside teammates Wang Chuqin and Fan Zhendong, as they beat Sweden in table tennis.
